body:
## Summary
Implements limit/offset pagination for `listItems()` per issue #1.

- `listItems({ limit, offset })` returns a slice of the items list.
- Sane defaults: page size **20**, max **100**, offset **0**.
- Invalid/negative/non-integer inputs fall back to documented defaults; offset past the end returns `[]`.
- API documented in the README.

## Tests
Added unit tests proving limit/offset slice correctly, partial final page, max-limit clamping, invalid-input fallback, and out-of-range offset. All 6 tests pass via `node --test`.

Closes #1

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: feat: add pagination to the items list (#1)
